query:
UPDATE users
            SET
                first_name = COALESCE($2, first_name),
                last_name  = COALESCE($3, last_name),
                phone      = COALESCE($4, phone),
                phone_verified = CASE
                    WHEN $4::text IS NOT NULL AND $4 IS DISTINCT FROM phone
                    THEN false
                    ELSE phone_verified
                END,
                bio        = COALESCE($5, bio)
            WHERE id = $1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
